reason: The statement applies because the text contrasts the experiences of Naomi and Ruth, highlighting their different situations and responses to adversity. Naomi expresses bitterness and emptiness due to the losses she has suffered, while Ruth shows loyalty and devotion, choosing to stay with Naomi and adopt her people and God as her own. This stark difference in their attitudes and actions towards their circumstances can be seen as emphasizing the contrast between light (Ruth's loyalty and devotion) and darkness (Naomi's bitterness and emptiness).
